notfound_subtitle: It seems like this route does not exist in our system — much like a missing clue. Try going back to the homepage and starting fresh.
about_subtitle: A lightweight, open-source intelligence toolkit built for investigative work. BlueScope transforms raw case data into clear, dependable AI-driven insights, streamlining investigative analysis and supporting precise, evidence-based decision-making.
setting_subtitle: Manage your investigative environment and AI parameters.
setting_providers_description: Manage the LLM providers you want to use in this app, which the agent will choose from based on the priority you set.
setting_connect_warning: Connection appears to be successful, but a warning was received: {message}
setting_generate_warning: Generation appears to be successful, but a warning was received: {message}
setting_change_to_take_effect: You will see the change when you switch page or refresh this page.
cases_table_description: A table of cases showing key information such as case name, priority, and last updated date. You can click on a case to view details or edit information.
cases_add_description: Describe the incident in detail so that the system can help analyze and provide recommendations accurately.
caeses_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this case? This action cannot be undone.
cases_archive_description: This case is closed, which will be removed from the searchable list and be strikethrough in the case list page. To undo, click the reopen case button.
description_subtitle: View and edit the description of the case
description_empty: No description for this case. Try editing to add details then try again.
nodata_subtitle: It seems like there is no data in this section. Try adding new data or refreshing to see changes.
nocase_subtitle: It seems like no case has been selected — like a missing clue. Try going back to the case list and selecting a case to view details.
refine_subtitle: Refine case information such as names, events, locations, and more to help AI analyze and summarize more accurately
knowledge_subtitle: Review the entities of the case such as names, events, locations, and more
persons_description: People involved in the case, such as witnesses, suspects, or victims.
events_description: Significant events that occurred in the case, such as crimes, arrests, or testimonies.
locations_description: Significant locations related to the case, such as crime scenes, arrest locations, or testimony locations.
organizations_description: Organizations related to the case, such as companies, agencies, or groups.
assets_description: Assets related to the case, such as vehicles, electronic devices, or other valuables.
damages_description: Damages that occurred in the case, such as physical damages, property damages, or psychological damages.
evidence_description: Evidence related to the case, such as videos, photos, or documents.
links_description: Links between different entities in the case, such as relationships between persons, related events, or connected locations.
name: Name
classification_subtitle: Classify the case type using AI to help with case management and investigation planning
classification_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the classification of this case? This action will clear all the case type data that AI has analyzed.
suggestion_subtitle: Generate investigation suggestions using AI to help with investigation planning and decision making
suggestion_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the suggestions of this case? This action will clear all the suggestion data that AI has analyzed.
suggestion_synthesis_description: Synthesize key investigation suggestions from all the sub-suggestions
dev_subtitle: Tools for developers to test and fine-tune AI functionalities
dev_system_prompt_description: The prompt used to define the behavior of the AI model in analyzing cases
dev_result_description: The result obtained from analyzing the case using the defined system prompt
dev_presets_description: Manage preset configurations for quick loading
dev_missing_system_prompt: System prompt is missing, please fill in the system prompt before testing generation
dashboard_subtitle: Overview of investigative cases and activity
